positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features elegant, abstract silhouettes of towering stylized trees with glowing, bioluminescent canopy details. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, utilizing deep indigo and emerald green as primary colors, with golden yellow accents emanating from the light sources. The foreground features clean, stylized, flowing organic elements like illuminated river reflections and ethereal mist. High contrast, clean vector style, perfect for apparel printing, with crisp edges and strong silhouettes. Art Deco and Japanese woodblock print influences. Intricate detail, high resolution.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, distortion, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, complex, photorealism, cinematic, muted colors
